name: Daily Udhaar Summary
query:
SELECT
    `tabUdhaar Entry`.`date` AS "Date:Date:120",
    `tabUdhaar Entry`.`entry_type` AS "Entry Type::150",
    SUM(`tabUdhaar Entry`.`amount`) AS "Total Amount:Currency:150"
FROM
    `tabUdhaar Entry`
GROUP BY
    `tabUdhaar Entry`.`date`,
    `tabUdhaar Entry`.`entry_type`
ORDER BY
    `tabUdhaar Entry`.`date` DESC
